entry.title: counting days like seconds
entry.summary:
Author: h4rlowhq

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,391Chapters: 2/22Kudos: 2

Summary: buck meets eddie diaz like its nothingjust another transfer. another shift. another perso who probably wont last.except eddie does.somewhere between calls and late nights and a kid who smiles too easy, buck stops being reckless just for the hell of it and starts becuase it doesn’t matter.buck keeps a secret he was never supposed to carry alone.eddie keeps trying to understand something buck refuses to explain.christopher is the only one who see it for what it is.and by the time the truth comes out, its already too late to fix it.some things don’t get better.some things just run out of time.

entry.title: break up with your boyfriend, i'm bored
entry.summary:
Author: adoringbuck

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,840Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 198

Summary: Buck: eddie??? do u want anything???Eddie: An iced white mocha with sweet cream foam would be great. Thanks Buck  group chat: victims 🫤 (Chim, Hen, Ravi, Maddie)Ravi: 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈Ravi: that is the gayest order i’ve ever heard in my life Hen: Well, he is gay, Ravi Ravi: yeah and a pain in my ass for it too orA chat fic full of crack. That's literally it.Oh, and Eddie Diaz is gay, and everyone knows it except for Buck.

entry.title: Weathering the storm
entry.summary:
Author: Never_x_Better

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,302Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 44

Summary: Post 09x14, Eddie tries to give Buck the space he wants, but quickly realises that's not what he actually needs. Even if he ends up hating him for it, he vows to do everything he can to help his friend with his declining mental health. Or All the ways Eddie demonstrates his love for Buck without actually saying the L word, while Buck finally deals with everything he has been suppressing.

entry.title: The Ice is My Home
entry.summary:
Author: maygoogoo613

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,438Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: Living in Pennsylvania, skating was always a popular activity and sport for many to partake in. Evan - Buck - had been signed up for hockey ever since he could remember, his parents getting him into all the masculine sports that was offered.But it was just an excuse to keep him busy and out of their hair for a while. And Buck hated hockey. He had no clear reason for the hatred but it was there.Then one day when his dad had dropped him at the rink early, a male figure skater running through a routine had caught his eye. Buck knew that it was right, so after a lot of begging and a compromise he signed up for lessons and began to learn the art of figure skating.He was good and quickly rose up the ranks, earning medals in local competitions that his parents begrudgingly drove him to.And when he turned 18, he packed his bags and left home, traveling around the states (even going down to South America) before settling down in LA as a firefighter. He had left his life as a skater behind until one call to an ice rink brought him back.And he lived again.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Last chances and second glances
entry.summary:
Author: thebookofcrows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 193,947Chapters: 57/60Kudos: 944

Summary: St. Anthony’s was his last chance, and Evan knew that. He had been kicked out of five schools in the past six years, and after his sophomore year ended with a meeting between his parents and his last headmaster that could be summarized with: “we’re not kicking him out, but just know that Evan is not welcome back in September.” His parents wanted to send him to military school.       Evan knew he couldn’t survive military school, that would be his last drop, the one that finally shattered the vase. He couldn’t be the type of person that would be able to put himself back together once they broke him down.     This had to work. . . . Buck is the new kid in an El Paso boarding school, trying his best to stay out of trouble. Eddie is a rockstar (in the world of high school popularity) he's captain to the football team, he's dating the most popular girl in school, and looking at a full ride sports scholarship in the fall. He should feel like he won at life, which is why he doesn't understand why the only time he feels alive is when he catches a glimpse of the new guy on the running team. Or in simpler terms: Buddie high-school AU!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: your love is tough (your love is tried)
entry.summary:
Author: phototrophs

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,729Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

Summary: “I thought you said you were gonna go to therapy Tuesday night,” Eddie says, voice steady and just very barely accusatory. He looks every bit concerned boyfriend, and at the same time, unyielding Dom. His stomach drops as Eddie steps closer and crowds into his space. Buck’s aware that he probably looks like a deer caught in the headlights, and he scrambles to find an acceptable answer. “Yeah, I was gonna go… I forgot Maddie had invited me for dinner, so I rescheduled,” Buck replies.Or, Buck lies about going to therapy. Eddie has a thing or two to say about that.

entry.title: You are my home
entry.summary:
Author: Enti13666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,979Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 294

Summary: When Christopher calls his grandparents after seeing his father with a copy of his mother, he was hoping for a few weeks of peace in El Paso. What he didn't expect was for his grandparents to sue his father for custody. When his father clearly doesn't want him and doesn't show up in court, Chris does the only thing he can. He calls his Buck. Buck has never let him down before.

entry.title: Submerged
entry.summary:
Author: Abcdefukoff

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,931Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 1,451

Summary: After the wave hits, Buck manages to get Christopher atop the fire engine, but his injuries leave them stranded. Eddie thinks his boys are safe, but is soon to discover the complete opposite. Will he get them to safety before blood-thinner boy bleeds out? And what will he do with all the feelings that arise during the rescue? It's a tsunami fic guys - you know the drill.

entry.title: See Me For Me
entry.summary:
Author: Need_lifeline

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,871Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 151

Summary: Eyes darting around each ‘face’ in the parking lot, sweat suddenly sticking uncomfortably to his body, breath quickening, legs speeding up, even though his knee is aching from the sudden random strain, even if it’s begging him to slow down. He doesn’t know what’s going on but he’d rather not stick around and find out. Everything in Buck is telling him to run. Run fast and far and don’t look back. Once Buck reaches his jeep, he immediately gets inside and locks all his doors as if speedrunning a Guinness World Record. Then, he finally takes a deep breath, the eyes are out there, but they can’t reach him from inside. He can finally take a deep, very oxygenated breath—just to have his breath stuck in his throat again. No. Who is that? What is that? Looking back at him in the vanity mirror, staring into him, mocking him…was him, but it wasn’t. Everything was wrong. Buck couldn’t recognize the face in front of him just knows that it’s copying his movements, even the timing in his blinks, trying to be him, but not quite getting it right.   OR: During the grocery store fight Buck develops prosopagnosia (face blindness). How will he survive not recognizing anyone and with his family hating him?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: soft and easy, as your breathing
entry.summary:
Author: lesmiserablol

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,038Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 133

Summary: “What, so you’re allowed to ask me how I'm doing but I can’t ask you?” Eddie laughs, staring at his coffee. “It’s not that, I just…I mean, it’s different, for you.” “And it’s different for you. Sure, I’m his sister, but you’re his…” Maddie hesitates for only a second, but his gaze snaps up to her, and she breaks off before she can decide how to complete that sentence. “Best friend,” he finishes. It sounds insufficient even to his own ears.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Rebuilding
entry.summary:
Author: SidneyPrescottFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,927Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 2

Summary: After two years since the tournament ended. While out getting some more supplies for New San Francisco's continued rebuild. Two of residences find themselves in trouble trying to get back to the community.

entry.title: "I wanna go home."
entry.summary:
Author: WJHPMM

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,719Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: Buck and Tommy broke up 2 months ago. Something was wrong, Buck wasn't being Buck and it confused everyone in the firehouse, because Buck is different. He's hurting and not telling anyone. Or Buck tried to break up with Tommy, Tommy only agreed at one condition. When Buck said no, he did it anyway, and Buck has a constant cloud in his head and goes into a depressive episode.

entry.title: Home Sweet Home
entry.summary:
Author: emmlove14

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,889Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 11

Summary: To say Bucks first month at the 118 was bad is an understatement. Right now she is currently resting her head on the porcelain toilet while Hen holds her hair back. She had only just started a month ago, right before Eddie had left. She had joined because Eddie said he wasn’t going back. But a week into her new job she came home to an empty house with a note. or What if Buck was female and was married to Eddie who was in Afghanistan while no one at the 118 know that she's married or pregnant.
